name: ambient-codex
description: Codex-native Ambient delegation, audits, builds, and model routing.

interface.shortDescription: Route token-heavy Codex work through Ambient models.
interface.longDescription: Ambient Codex adds a Codex-native skill, MCP control tools, and a stdlib CLI for Ambient setup, model selection, mode control, audits, code generation briefs, repository maps, usage controls, and delegated frontier-model work. Hooks are not registered by default.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Ambient Codex when token-heavy planning, audits, builds, repository maps, or second-opinion model checks would help.
